response.overview: Elena, a hardworking Filipina housekeeper in Las Vegas, struggles to provide for her teenage son, Miguel, who is suspended from school for defending her honor. Meanwhile, Gabriel, a famous pop star, grows weary of his suffocating celebrity lifestyle. Their worlds collide when Gabriel, fleeing a mob of fans, stumbles into Elena's workplace, and she unexpectedly helps him through a panic attack. Their brief but heartfelt connection is captured by paparazzi, setting the stage for a media frenzy and an unforeseen entanglement in each other's lives.
response.title: Maid To Shine
